heading: Service of process
label: 100110 Service of process
text: The corporation shall comply with the law on service of process of each State in which it is incorporated and each State in which it carries on activities.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)10011036:1704., , .Nov. 20, 1981Pub. L. 97–82, § 495 Stat. 1091The words “in furtherance of its corporate purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
